rationale: The only change was employer names (re:cinq/Optilyz/GISCollective → Stripe/Shopify/Datadog), and the score stayed identical at 8/10 in both evaluations. The shifted concerns (UML, IT consulting vs. IT security/project management, German proficiency) are reworded variations on the same themes of missing direct experience, well within ordinary run-to-run noise. Neither evaluation credits the famous brands nor penalizes the lesser-known ones — no reasoning keys off the employer change.
